layout.siteDescription: Fabian Montoya is a full stack engineer from Nicaragua building internal tools, automation platforms, and AI-integrated workflows for distributed teams.

presentation.tagline: I build internal systems, automation platforms, and AI-integrated tools for teams in the U.S., Latin America, Europe, and Nicaragua.

hero.headline: I turn fragile workflows into reliable software.
hero.description1: Full-time engineer from Nicaragua focused on React, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, .NET, and Python. I build data-heavy dashboards, automation tooling, and internal workflows for distributed teams, and I am open to remote roles worldwide or onsite roles in Nicaragua.
promises: Built and maintained systems used by 150 internal users across cross-team operations.
Increased patient verification throughput by 10x with parallel automation tooling.
Shipped a greenfield operations dashboard in 3 months and kept improving it in production.

experience.title: PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
experience.description: Full stack product, workflow, and automation work delivered for operational teams.

otherExperience.title: Other experiences
otherExperience.description: Freelance experience building and maintaining business websites and online stores with WordPress, Shopify, and other CMS platforms, with a focus on clean content management, responsive layouts, and practical business goals.

items.description: Roca Company Solutions provides U.S.-focused management services for DMV cases, vehicle insurance, and product operations.
achievements: Built the frontend from scratch for Maya, the company's first operations dashboard for DMV cases, insurance, products, invoices, and service management, delivering the initial system in 3 months with React, Vite, TanStack Query, and TanStack Table.
Designed spreadsheet-familiar interfaces and helped migrate high-volume operational data from Google Sheets into Maya, lowering friction for users moving into the new system.
Implemented exports to XLSX, PDF, and images and optimized data-heavy modules for fast rendering across cases, clients, products, insurance, users, and logs.

items.description: Dentalrobot automates high-volume dental appointment verifications on U.S. insurer websites.
achievements: Maintain and extend CC (Control Central), the company's cross-team workflow management system used by 150 internal users, improving Angular-based UX, accessibility, stability, and scalability.
Built Formless, a browser-based editor for table- and bookmark-driven patient audit forms, replacing fragile DOCX editing workflows and helping teams review robot-scraped patient results inside CC.

Developed the Parallel Engine in Python to execute multiple verification robots concurrently, increasing patient verification throughput by 10x in the same time window while keeping resource usage controlled.

Built the Rocketbot Interpreter, a Docker Compose-based runtime with FastAPI, Python 3.12 and 3.6 services, centralized logs, reproducible debugging, and parallel execution support, eliminating the complex Windows setup previously required to test and review robots with real company data.

projects.title: SELECTED WORK
projects.description: A mix of private product work and public projects that show how I approach internal tools, automation, and data-heavy interfaces.

items.rocketbot-interpreter: Sanitized case study of a Docker Compose runtime that exposed legacy Rocketbot execution through an API, improved debugging reproducibility, centralized logs, and enabled parallel robot runs.
items.maya-dashboard: Greenfield frontend for a service operations dashboard covering DMV cases, insurance, products, invoices, and spreadsheet-oriented workflows.
items.formless: Internal browser-based editor for patient audit forms built around tables and bookmarks, reducing DOCX fragility and moving editing into the main workflow system.
items.ferreteria-berrios: Public inventory and billing dashboard for a hardware store with reporting workflows and operational views.

skills.title: TECHNICAL SKILLS
skills.subtitle: Tech stack
skills.description: Core technologies I use to build full stack products, automation tooling, and AI-assisted workflows.

agents.title: AI workflow tools
agents.description: I use these tools to speed up research, implementation, and debugging, but the value I bring is shipping reliable systems in production.
agents.label: AI workflow tool

footer.title: Open to full-time roles
footer.description: Remote worldwide or onsite in Nicaragua. Best fit: full stack engineering with automation, internal tools, and AI-assisted workflows.
